title: Lost World - The Broken Script
description: A challenging Horror Modpack which slowly destroys your world while dangerous creatures are watching you
body: [![KH Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f69c5ff58ef061c0e6fadee4a7a4a8f00e3fcaf3_0.webp)](https://www.kinetichosting.net/partners/lost-world-the-broken-script/order) # 🕯️ **Lost World – A TBS Modpack** > A lightweight **horror adventure** modpack based on *The Broken Script* — now updated for **Minecraft 1.21.1** with **quests**, new surprises, and an enhanced gameplay experience! --- ## 📢 Important Information This is a **Modpack** and not a Mod. This means that this is a **collection of mods** with an additional questline also containing the **The Broken Script** Mod. 1.20.1 Forge Versions have been deleted as the Minecraft Version itself and the TBS Versions are **very unstable**. If you have any questions or encounter issues, please **join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/VT65HnH9RF)** for support. Use the **comments section** for reviews. [Lost World is also available on **CurseForge**.](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/lost-world-the-broken-script) --- ## 🧩 Description **Lost World** is a lightweight horror-focused modpack centered around the mysterious and immersive mod **The Broken Script** (TBS). Explore a corrupted, crumbling world where you're **watched**, **hunted**, and slowly **driven insane**… This modpack introduces: - ☠️ Dangerous **Entities** - 🏚️ New **Structures** & terrifying **Mobs** - 🌀 Over **50 random events** triggered by the TBS mod - ✅ A complete **questing/story line** You can easily **invite friends** to your world using **Essential**, and talk with them via **Simple Voice Chat**. Visuals are enhanced with **pre-installed Shaders** and **Euphoria patches** for added immersion. (Recommended Shader: **SI: Spectre**) --- ## 🛠️ Included Mods (Selection) * 🎮 **The Broken Script** * 👻 **Horror Elements Mod** * 🗣️ **Simple Voice Chat** * 🧍 **Essential** * ⛏️ **FTB Ultimine** * 🌠 Optional **Shaders & Euphoria patches** --- ## 🎨 Customization Options You can personalize your experience at any time: - Open the In-Game Config by going to **Game Menu > Mods > The Broken Script > Config** --- ## 🎥 Community Videos Watch how others experience **The Lost World**: --- ## 🌐 Hosting Recommendation **KineticHosting** is my personal recommendation: - 💸 Great pricing - 🚀 Amazing performance - 🤝 Fast & friendly support - 🌍 Multiple global locations Thanks to KineticHosting for the partnership – setting up a server has never been easier! [**Quickly install the latest Version of the Modpack**](https://www.kinetichosting.net/partners/lost-world-the-broken-script/order) --- ## 🙌 Credits - 🖼️ Menu slideshow images by **NightXXI** - 🔧 TBS Server Patch (v1.9.3) by **KjuMe** - ▶️ Thanks to **NightXXI** and **KalarianAthecila** for helping with the Modpack Quests --- ## 💬 Feedback Your feedback is **greatly appreciated**! Thank you for the **incredible support** and the fast growth of this modpack!
